message:
feat(search,ui): semantic indexer improvements, two-tier search refinements, and UI state management

- Improve semantic indexer with additional error handling paths
- Expand two-tier search with refined scoring and edge case handling
- Fix sources setup minor adjustment
- Expand UI app state management with additional view transitions and
  improved search result display logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
